zh.lifeSummary: 當John Fortescue於大約1374年出生時，他的父親William Fortescue II30歲，母親Elizabeth de Beauchamp36歲。他於1405年之前與Eleanor Norreys結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他於1421年被列為disproved captain of the captured castle of meaux。他去世於1435年在法國瑟-吉馬內米奧享年62歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Fortescue于大约1374年出生时，他的父亲William Fortescue II30岁，母亲Elizabeth de Beauchamp36岁。他于1405年之前与Eleanor Norreys结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他于1421年被列为disproved captain of the captured castle of meaux。他去世于1435年在法国瑟-吉馬內米奧享年62岁。

nameMeanings.name: Fortescue
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): nickname from Old French fort ‘strong’ + escu ‘shield’.
History: A family of this name claim descent from Radulfus Fortescu who is recorded in Domesday Book (1086) as holding lands at Modbury (Devon).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When John Fortescue was born about 1374, his father, William Fortescue II, was 30 and his mother, Elizabeth de Beauchamp, was 36. He married Eleanor Norreys before 1405. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. In 1421, at the age of 50, his occupation is listed as disproved captain of the captured castle of meaux. He died in 1435, in Meaux, Seine-et-Marne, France, at the age of 62.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Fortescue est né environ 1374, son père, William Fortescue II, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth de Beauchamp, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Eleanor Norreys avant 1405. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. En 1421, à l’âge de 50 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est disproved captain of the captured castle of meaux. Il est décédé en 1435, à Meaux, Seine-et-Marne, France, à l’âge de 62 ans.

de.South Tawton, Devon, England, United Kin: South Tawton, Devon, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als John Fortescue um 1374 geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Fortescue II 30 und seine Mutter Elizabeth de Beauchamp 36. Er hat vor 1405 Eleanor Norreys geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. 1421, als er 50 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als disproved captain of the captured castle of meaux aufgeführt. Er starb 1435 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Meaux, Seine-et-Marne, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Fortescue è nato il circa 1374, il suo padre, William Fortescue II, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth de Beauchamp, aveva 36 anni. Lui sposato Eleanor Norreys prima del 1405. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Nel 1421, all'età di 50 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come disproved captain of the captured castle of meaux. Morì nel 1435, nel Meaux, Seine-et-Marne, Francia, all'età di 62 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Fortescueが約1374年に生まれた時，父William Fortescue IIは30歳，母Elizabeth de Beauchampは36歳であった。1405年以前にEleanor Norreysと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。1421年，50歳の時，職業はdisproved captain of the captured castle of meauxと記録されている。彼は1435年にフランスセアイネ-エト-マルンメアウックスで62歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Fortescue(이)가 대략 1374년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Fortescue II(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth de Beauchamp(은)는 36세였다. 그는 1405년 이전 Eleanor Norreys(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1421년, 50세의 나이로 그의 직업은 disproved captain of the captured castle of meaux이었다. 그는 1435년 프랑스 세이인-트-마니 모스에서 62세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Fortescue nasceu aproximadamente 1374, seu pai, William Fortescue II, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth de Beauchamp, tinha 36 anos. Ele casou-se com Eleanor Norreys antes 1405. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Em 1421, com 50 anos, sua profissão aparece como disproved captain of the captured castle of meaux. Ele faleceu em 1435, em Meaux, Seine-et-Marne, França, com 62 anos.

ro.South Tawton, Devon, England, United Kin: South Tawton, Devon, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Fortescue родился около 1374 г., его отцу по имени William Fortescue II было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth de Beauchamp, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Eleanor Norreys перед 1405 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. В 1421 году, в возрасте 50 лет,  он работал по профессии disproved captain of the captured castle of meaux. Он умер в 1435 г. в местности мокс, сине-ет-марн, Франция в возрасте 62 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Fortescue nació aproximadamente 1374, su papá, William Fortescue II, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Elizabeth de Beauchamp, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Eleanor Norreys antes de 1405. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. En 1421, a la edad de 50 años, su ocupación registrada era disproved captain of the captured castle of meaux. Murió en 1435, en Meaux, Seine-et-Marne, Francia, a la edad de 62 años.
